title: Remove Reloading Bar
description: Add-on for Remove Reloading Screen that removes the bar as well
body:
> This mod has been archived as this feature is built-in to Remove Reloading Screen, you have to configure the project in Mod Menu.

[Remove Reloading Screen (RRLS)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) is probably one of my favorite QoL mods out there - it's just so nice to have when you want to switch things up and change your pack. However, one thing that I dislike about it is the loading bar - it's exactly where it doesn't need to be, and feels more intrusive than anything - which is why this mod was created.

## Without Remove Reloading Screen or Remove Resource Loading Bar:
![Without Either Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/711e84a87ea1a6eb8d7cf7f8573038f7c7e1cd35.gif)

## With Remove Reloading Screen but without Remove Resource Loading Bar:
![With RRLS but not this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f9aa5b9173aba48b49985ba9bef276f1bbf2a0.gif)


## With both Remove Reloading Screen and Remove Resource Loading Bar:
![z](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0056b6d34d838460874554c4e709367015fb592.gif)

## FAQ

**Does this mod require RRLS?**
Technically, no, and you _can_ use it without RRLS, but it would just look bad. I'd _heavily advise_ using RRLS, but in the end it is your choice.

**Neoforge port?**
Normally, I don't do Neoforge, but this mod was absurdly simple to make, so yes, it is on its way.

Update: Mod has been ported to Neoforge

**What happens if my resource load fails?**
Minecraft sends you a toast (the little box with text in the upper right) letting you know that your resource load failed, so you will still be able to see it.

**Specific version?**
Open an issue on my GitHub for compatibility for a specific version.
